title: Łódki Racing
body:
Łódki Racing is another minecraft boat racing. You will ask why, the answer is short - No idea.

This modpack has best performance mods, for example - Sodium.
I am focused on making this modpack pure performance with out any useless mods for boatracing.

I have included mods like:
- BoatHUD
- OpenBoatUtilist
- Boat Cam

Hope you like it, I am open for mods suggestions.
